REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT LARRY ODBERT'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED: (1) DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CC 2924B AND F TO ALLEGE TENDER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES THAT DEFENDANTS FAILED TO COMPLY WITH NOTICE REQUIREMENTS BY FAILING TO SERVE THE REQUIRED NOTICE(S) ON PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF UCL IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE INJURY IN FACT; (2) DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUDULENT MISREPRESENTATION, ELDER ABUSE, DECLARATORY AND INJUNCTIVE RELIEF, AND ACCOUNTING ARE SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. AFTER MULTIPLE OPPORTUNITIES PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE ORDER IN CONFORMITY WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING AND PRESENT IT FOR EXECUTION AT THE TIME OF THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO FILE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT NO LATER THAN BY 4:00 P.M. ON JUNE 30, 2017. THE COURT NOTES THAT THE PLAINTIFF ROUTINELY FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP AND NO SUCH VIOLATIONS WILL BE EXCUSED IN THE FUTURE. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)
